lesson.menu_desc: Who Is Victor Paschotto at Brinks? — Present Perfect vs Simple Past — 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 — Diagnostic + Personal Baseline — Who Is Victor Paschotto at Brinks?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View — Victor Malvezi Paschotto | Aula 1 — Diagnostic + Personal Baseline

listenings.text: Hi Victor, this is Sarah Mitchell from the Americas regional office. I wanted to give you a quick heads-up about the quarterly review meeting next Thursday. We will be reviewing the growth numbers for Latin America, and I have been told that HQ wants a detailed breakdown of the new client acquisition pipeline. I have already sent you the slide template, so please fill in your section by Wednesday. One more thing: the VP from India will be joining the call, so we might need to adjust the time zone. I will confirm the final time tomorrow. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: First, introduce yourself with your name and position. Second, state the purpose of the meeting. Third, present the key data points. Fourth, invite questions from the group. Fifth, summarize the next steps and deadlines.
